text: 0x2100 | HR8448 | VFD Command | 0x0001 = FWD run, 0x0002 = REV run, 0x0005 = stop, 0x0007 = fault reset
0x2103 | HR8451 | Output Frequency | Hz | divided by 10. 0x2104 HR8452 Output Current Amps divided by 10. 0x2105 HR8453 DC Bus Voltage. 0x210F HR8463 Fault Code 0=no fault.
HR400107 vfd_frequency Hz divided by 10. HR400115 vfd_cmd_word 1=fwd 2=rev 5=stop. HR400116 vfd_freq_setpoint Hz divided by 10.
